# Grey Sky Responder Society — Build Status Update

**Date:** 2026-04-13
**Generated by:** ATLAS
**Purpose:** Upload to Claude App as project knowledge — reflects the real state of the build as of this date.

---

## Stack (Authoritative — supersedes all prior references)

| Component | Version / Service |
|-----------|------------------|
| Framework | Next.js 16.1.6 (App Router, Server Components, React 19) |
| Language | TypeScript 5 |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS 4 |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL 16 + PostGIS) |
| Auth | Supabase Auth (GoTrue) — **NOT NextAuth.js** |
| Hosting | Azure Static Web Apps — **NOT Vercel** |
| CI/CD | GitHub Actions → Azure SWA |
| CMS | **None** — Sanity.io dropped 2026-04-10 (trial ended, never integrated) |
| Email | SendGrid (abstracted via `src/lib/config/email.ts`) |
| Payments | Stripe (not yet integrated) |
| GitHub Org | `greyskyresponder` |
| Repo | `grey-sky-site` |

## Brand

- **Command Navy:** `#0A1628`
- **Signal Gold:** `#C5933A`
- **Ops White:** `#F5F5F5`
- **Font:** Inter
- **Language:** Use "service" / "serving" — **NEVER** "career" or "resume"
- **Terminology:** Must align with NIMS / NQS / FEMA RTLT

## Database — Current State

**11 migrations applied.** Key tables:

| Table | Purpose | Phase |
|-------|---------|-------|
| `users` | Member profiles (expanded 2026-04-13: +9 columns incl. service_start_year, primary_discipline, service_statement, profile_completeness) | 0/2 |
| `user_communities` | Member community connections | 2 (new 2026-04-13) |
| `user_service_orgs` | Member service organizations | 2 (new 2026-04-13) |
| `user_teams` | Member team associations | 2 (new 2026-04-13) |
| `user_qualifications` | Structured qualifications with verification_status | 2 (new 2026-04-13) |
| `user_languages` | Member language proficiencies | 2 (new 2026-04-13) |
| `user_affinities` | Member affinity connections | 0 |
| `documents` | Categorized document library with storage links (expanded 2026-04-13) | 2 |
| `deployment_records` | ICS deployment history | 2 |
| `incidents` | Incident registry (ICS 209-aligned) | 2 |
| `rtlt_positions` | 625 FEMA RTLT positions | 0 |
| `rtlt_team_types` | 152 team types from RTLT | 0 |
| `affinities` | 37 affinity categories | 0 |
| `organizations` | Organization entities | 0 |
| `sky_points_ledger` | Points transaction ledger | 0 |
| `validation_requests` | 360-validation workflow | 0 |
| `evaluation_requests` | ICS 225 evaluation workflow | 0 |
| `certification_applications` | Certification pathway | 0 |

**RLS:** Enabled on every table. Member data scoped to `auth.uid()`. Staff/admin has read access where specified.

**Enums:** `document_category_enum` (9 values), `AffinityCategory`, discipline enums, role enums.

**Triggers:** `updated_at` auto-update, `years_of_service` computed, `profile_completeness` auto-recalc on profile mutations.

---

## Today's Build (2026-04-13) — What Changed

### DOC-202 Profile Expansion (`f43fbf3`)

**29 files changed, +3,685 lines**

- **Migration:** 5 new tables (user_communities, user_service_orgs, user_teams, user_qualifications, user_languages) + 9 new columns on users + triggers + RLS
- **Types:** UserProfile, UserCommunity, UserServiceOrg, UserTeam, UserQualification, UserLanguage, UserAffinity, ProfileSection
- **Validators:** 8 Zod schemas (basicInfo, serviceIdentity, community, serviceOrg, team, qualification, language, affinities)
- **Server actions:** 18 functions (getMyProfile, updateBasicInfo, updateServiceIdentity, CRUD for all entity types, setPrimaryOrg, updateAffinities)
- **View components:** 8 sections (ProfileView, ServiceIdentity, CommunitiesSection, OrganizationsSection, TeamsSection, QualificationsSection, LanguagesSection, ProfileCompleteness)
- **Edit components:** 8 editors (BasicInfoForm, ServiceIdentityForm, CommunityEditor, OrgEditor, TeamEditor, QualificationEditor, LanguageEditor, AffinityPicker)
- **Profile completeness engine:** SVG ring + 8-section checklist + "Next: [section] →" nudge

### DOC-206 Document Library (`09ccd5c`)

**14 files created, +2,099 lines**

- **Migration:** Documents table expansion with `document_category_enum` (9 categories), FK links, storage bucket + RLS, indexes
- **Server actions:** 8 functions (getMyDocuments, getDocumentById, uploadDocument, updateDocument, archiveDocument, getDocumentUrl, linkDocumentToQualification, unlinkDocument)
- **Components:** FileDropzone (drag-and-drop), DocumentUploadForm (category-conditional fields), DocumentLibrary (grid/list toggle, filters, pagination), DocumentCard, DocumentRow, DocumentDetail (inline preview), DocumentPreview (PDF iframe / image), DocumentLinkSelector
- **Routes:** `/dashboard/documents`, `/dashboard/documents/upload`, `/dashboard/documents/[id]`
- **Storage:** Private Supabase bucket, UUID-based paths, signed URLs (5-min expiry)
- **Linking:** Document → qualification link updates verification_status to `document_linked`; unlink reverts to `self_reported`

---

## Key Architecture Decisions

| Decision | Resolution |
|----------|-----------|
| Auth provider | Supabase Auth (GoTrue) — NOT NextAuth.js |
| Hosting | Azure Static Web Apps — NOT Vercel |
| CMS | None — Sanity.io dropped |
| Public profiles | **No.** Profiles visible only to member + GSRS staff (OD-10 resolved) |
| Pronouns field | **Removed** per directive (commit `17c8e53`) |
| DOB on profile | Stored but **NEVER displayed** on profile view |
| Credential numbers | Masked on view: `····1234` |
| Document storage | Supabase Storage, private bucket, signed URLs only |

## File Structure (Key Paths)

```
grey-sky-site/
├── docs/
│   ├── design/                    # 15 design docs (GSR-DOC-*)
│   ├── prompts/                   # Claude Code discipline protocol
│   ├── BUILD-JOURNAL.md           # Full narrative build history
│   └── PROJECT-STATUS.md          # Prior status snapshot
├── supabase/
│   └── migrations/                # 11 SQL migrations
├── src/
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── (public)/              # Public site routes
│   │   └── (dashboard)/           # Dashboard routes (auth required)
│   │       └── dashboard/
│   │           ├── profile/       # Profile view + edit
│   │           ├── documents/     # Document library + upload + detail
│   │           ├── records/       # Deployment records
│   │           └── incidents/     # Incident registry
│   ├── components/
│   │   ├── dashboard/
│   │   │   └── profile/           # 8 view + 8 edit components
│   │   ├── documents/             # 8 document components
│   │   └── public/                # Public site components
│   └── lib/
│       ├── actions/               # Server actions (profile, documents, auth, etc.)
│       ├── types/                 # TypeScript interfaces
│       ├── validators/            # Zod schemas
│       ├── supabase/              # Client + admin Supabase config
│       └── config/                # Storage, email, env abstractions
├── references/
│   ├── FEMA_RTLT_NQS_Database.json  # 625 RTLT records
│   └── RTLT-TAXONOMY.md
└── CLAUDE.md                      # Project instructions for Claude Code
```

---

## Discipline Protocol

Every Claude Code session follows `docs/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-DISCIPLINE.md`:

1. **Self-Review Gate (5 checks):** Security, Doctrine, Accessibility, Error Handling, Test Coverage
2. **Investigation Protocol:** 3-strike rule for bugs (hypothesize → test → escalate)
3. **Safety Guardrails:** No destructive commands, no force-push, no credential exposure
4. **Completion Report:** Every session ends with structured report (files changed, decisions, uncertainties, commits)
